div.style: color: #cdd6f4; line-height: 20px; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-all;

foreignObject.div: unityctl v0.2.0 — 18 tools ├── init Install the unityctl plugin into a Unity project │ ├── --project string Path to Unity project (required) │ └── --source string Custom local plugin source path ├── editor list Discover installed Unity editors │ └── --json bool Output as JSON ├── ping Verify unityctl connectivity to a Unity project │ ├── --project string Path to Unity project (required) │ └── --json bool Output as JSON ├── status Check Unity editor and project status │ ├── --project string Path to Unity project (required) │ ├── --wait bool Retry until editor responds │ └── --json bool Output as JSON ├── build Build a Unity project for a target platform │ ├── --project string Path to Unity project (required) │ ├── --target string Build target (StandaloneWindows64, OSX, Linux, │ │ Android, iOS, WebGL) │ ├── --output string Output path for build artifacts │ ├── --dryRun bool Validate without building (preflight check) │ └── --json bool Output as JSON
